fields.label: Agent
fields.description: The agent that created or owns this memory.

fields.label: Conversation
fields.description: The conversation from which this memory was extracted.

fields.label: Run
fields.description: The specific agent run that produced this memory.

fields.label: Source Type
fields.options:
conversation
run
manual
event
scheduled
imported
fields.description: How this memory was created: conversation (from chat), run (from execution), manual (user-created), event (triggered), scheduled (batch), or imported.

fields.label: Producer Mode
fields.description: The mechanism that produced this memory: main_agent, memory_agent, post_run_llm, rules_only, or manual (user-entered).

fields.label: Created from Turn #
fields.description: The conversation turn number when this memory was captured.

fields.label: Memory Profile
fields.description: The profile that defined the schema and capture behavior for this memory.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Current state: active (available for retrieval), superseded (replaced by newer version), archived (manually archived), expired (past TTL), or error (capture failed).

fields.label: Title
fields.description: Human-readable title summarizing the memory content.

fields.label: Memory Type
fields.options:
profile
session_state
preference
fact
plan
observation
insight
domain_object
custom
fields.description: The semantic type of this memory: profile (user info), session_state (temporary), preference (user likes), fact (knowledge), plan (future actions), observation (noted event), insight (derived conclusion), domain_object (structured data), or custom.

fields.label: Schema Name
fields.description: The JSON Schema this memory conforms to, if any.

fields.label: Data (JSON)
fields.description: The structured memory content in JSON format. This is the primary data payload.

fields.label: Summary
fields.description: A plain text summary of the memory for human review and full-text search.

fields.label: Raw Context Excerpt
fields.description: The original conversation excerpt from which this memory was extracted. Useful for auditing and debugging.

fields.label: Scope Type
fields.description: The visibility boundary: conversation (this chat only), user (all user's chats), agent (all this agent's chats), namespace (shared group), or global (all agents).

fields.label: Scope Key
fields.description: Unique identifier for the scope instance. E.g., user ID for user scope, conversation ID for conversation scope.

fields.label: Visibility
fields.description: Access control: private (owner only), shared_with_agent (owner + agent), shared_with_namespace (namespace members), or global (all users/agents).

fields.label: Confidence
fields.description: AI-assigned confidence score (0-1) indicating certainty about the memory accuracy. Higher = more certain.

fields.label: Importance Score
fields.description: AI-assigned importance score (0-1) indicating how significant this memory is. Used for ranking during retrieval.

fields.label: Effective From
fields.description: When this memory becomes valid. Before this time, the memory is not considered active.

fields.label: Effective Until
fields.description: When this memory expires. After this time, the memory status becomes 'expired'.

fields.label: TTL (Days)
fields.description: Time-to-live in days. The memory will automatically expire after this many days from creation.

fields.label: Supersedes Memory Record
fields.description: If this memory replaces an older version, link to the superseded record here.

fields.label: Creation Timestamp
fields.description: Exact time when this memory was created.

fields.label: Expiration Timestamp
fields.description: Calculated expiration time based on TTL or effective_until date.

fields.label: Tags
fields.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering memories.

fields.label: Metadata (JSON)
fields.description: Additional metadata about this memory. Use for custom fields, provenance tracking, or integration data.

fields.label: FTS Indexed
fields.description: Whether this memory has been indexed for full-text search.

fields.label: Vector Indexed
fields.description: Whether this memory has been indexed for vector/semantic search.

fields.label: Index Backend
fields.description: The backend used for indexing this memory.

fields.label: Last Indexed At
fields.description: When this memory was last indexed. Used to determine if re-indexing is needed.

fields.label: Last Retrieved At
fields.description: When this memory was last accessed. Used for LRU caching and importance scoring.

fields.label: Retrieval Count
fields.description: Number of times this memory has been retrieved. Used for popularity-based ranking.
